name: Old-Style Blueberry Jam
recipeInstructions:
1. Thaw berries if frozen. Wash and pick over the blueberries.
2. Measure out the berries into a heavy pot.
3. Crush the berries in the bottom layer of the pot until covered with liquid.
4. Add the remaining blueberries to the pot.
5. Add 1/2 cup water, and simmer the blueberries until they are soft.
6. When the fruit is soft, add the sugar and stir until completely dissolved.
7. Bring the mixture to a boil while stirring continuously to avoid sticking.
8. Reduce the heat and cook, uncovered over low heat until a small amount dropped on a plate stays in place.
9. Place the jam into hot sterilized jars.
